home.heroDescription: Discover internships, scholarships, and international programs curated for students and youth in Uzbekistan.
home.exploreDescription: Find the right opportunity for your goals
home.latestDesc: Fresh listings added by our AI scouter and community
home.aiTitle: We find opportunities so you don't have to
home.aiDesc: Our AI scouter monitors 50+ sources worldwide, automatically discovering internships, scholarships, and programs — and posts them here before you even know they exist.
home.aiDiscoveryDesc: Our scouter scans Erasmus+, DAAD, Chevening, UN, and dozens more sources every 6 hours.
home.aiUpdatesDesc: New opportunities are published automatically. No manual curation delays — you see them as they appear.
home.aiVerifiedDesc: Every listing is quality-checked. No scams, no expired posts — just real opportunities for real students.
home.ctaDesc: Create a free account to save opportunities, track applications, and get personalized recommendations.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.s1Text: InternGo ("we", "our", "us") respects your privacy. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, and protect your personal information when you use our platform.
privacy.s2a1: Account information (name, email address) when you register
privacy.s2a2: Profile data you choose to add (bio, avatar)
privacy.s2a3: Listings you submit to the platform
privacy.s2a4: Application tracking data (which opportunities you save or track)
privacy.s2a5: Notes you add to tracked applications
privacy.s2b1: Browser type, device information, and operating system
privacy.s2b2: Pages visited and time spent on the platform
privacy.s2b4: IP address (for security and analytics purposes)
privacy.s3a2: Enable features like saving listings and tracking applications
privacy.s3a4: Improve the platform based on usage patterns
privacy.s3a5: Prevent fraud and ensure platform security
privacy.s3Note: We do not sell, rent, or share your personal data with third parties for marketing purposes.
privacy.s4Text: Your data is stored securely using industry-standard encryption. Passwords are hashed and never stored in plain text. We implement appropriate technical and organizational measures to protect against unauthorized access.
privacy.s5Text: We use minimal cookies for authentication (keeping you logged in) and language preference. We do not use tracking cookies or third-party advertising cookies.
privacy.s6Text: You have the right to access, correct, delete, and export your personal data. To exercise any of these rights, contact us at privacy@interngo.uz.
privacy.s7Text: For privacy-related questions, contact us at privacy@interngo.uz.

terms.title: Terms of Use
terms.s1Text: By accessing or using InternGo ("the Platform"), you agree to be bound by these Terms of Use. If you do not agree, you may not use the Platform.
terms.s2Text: InternGo is a web platform that aggregates internships, scholarships, international programs, and other opportunities for students. We collect listings from user submissions and AI-powered discovery from publicly available sources.
terms.s3Text: To access certain features, you must create an account. You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your credentials. You must provide accurate information and be at least 16 years old.
terms.s4Text: By submitting content, you represent that the information is accurate, you have the right to share it, and the opportunity is legitimate. We reserve the right to review, edit, or remove any submitted content.
terms.s5Text: Some listings are discovered automatically by our AI scouter. While we strive for accuracy, we cannot guarantee all information is complete or error-free. Always verify details directly with the organizing body.
terms.s6Text: InternGo acts as an information aggregator. We do not endorse or guarantee the opportunities listed. We are not a party to any application process. The Platform is provided "as is" without warranties.
terms.s7Text: You agree not to post fraudulent listings, scrape data without permission, use the Platform for unlawful purposes, or interfere with the Platform's functioning.
terms.s8Text: InternGo shall not be liable for any damages arising from your use of the Platform, including losses from reliance on listing information or application outcomes.
terms.s9Text: We may modify these Terms at any time. Changes become effective upon posting. Continued use constitutes acceptance.
terms.s10Text: For questions about these Terms, contact us at legal@interngo.uz.
